findings.title: Privacy Risk Hotspot Detected
findings.description: Detected privacy risk keywords indicating potential issues with PII handling or consent mechanisms in the documentation.
assumptions: Privacy risks may arise from inadequate PII handling or lack of consent mechanisms.

evidence.excerpt: Detected privacy risk keywords in 1 source(s)

recommendations: Review PII handling practices and ensure compliance with consent mechanisms.

metadata.mitigation: Review PII handling practices and ensure compliance with consent mechanisms.

findings.title: Critical Push Notification Failure on Android 14
findings.description: Push notifications are failing to deliver on Android 14 devices, affecting approximately 8% of users. This issue needs to be resolved to ensure reliable notification delivery.
assumptions: Failure to deliver notifications on Android 14 could lead to user dissatisfaction and loss of engagement.

evidence.excerpt: Push notifications are failing to deliver on Android 14 devices.

recommendations: Resolve the push notification delivery issue on Android 14 devices.

metadata.mitigation: Resolve the push notification delivery issue on Android 14 devices.

findings.title: Accessibility Issues in Notification Center
findings.description: There are significant accessibility issues within the notification center, particularly for users with visual impairments, highlighting the need for inclusive design practices.
assumptions: Accessibility issues may hinder user experience for individuals with disabilities.
recommendations: Address accessibility issues in the notification center to ensure compliance with inclusive design practices.

metadata.mitigation: Address accessibility issues in the notification center.
metadata.policy_rule: Accessibility is a requirement, not an afterthought

findings.title: Compliance Risk Hotspot Detected
findings.description: Detected compliance risk keywords indicating potential issues with GDPR, CCPA, or other regulatory requirements in the documentation.
assumptions: Compliance risks may arise from inadequate adherence to data protection regulations.

evidence.excerpt: Detected compliance risk keywords in 2 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct a compliance review to ensure adherence to GDPR, CCPA, and other regulations.

metadata.mitigation: Conduct a compliance review to ensure adherence to GDPR, CCPA, and other regulations.

findings.title: Pricing Risk Hotspot Detected
findings.description: Detected pricing risk keywords indicating potential issues with pricing strategy that may affect competitiveness in the market.
assumptions: Pricing concerns may lead to loss of market share if not addressed.

evidence.excerpt: Detected pricing risk keywords in 3 source(s)

recommendations: Evaluate and adjust pricing strategy to ensure competitiveness.

metadata.mitigation: Evaluate and adjust pricing strategy to ensure competitiveness.

summary: Identified 5 risks (1 accessibility, 1 compliance, 1 pricing, 1 privacy, 1 security). 1 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (1 blockers, 1 warnings).
